rubric_rows.evidence: Main demo, no-video eval, stress eval, validator, and readiness audit are present.
Articulated hand, collision geoms, touch sensors, cap hinge, tactile lock dial/latch joints, button, plug/socket, contact timeline.
Sphere, cube, cylinder, cap twist, load hold, stylus, button, blind tactile arena, precision assembly, tactile combination lock.
No-snap grasp verification, minimum-jerk tactile control, adaptive regrasp, jam recovery, tactile detent verification.
Five-finger roles, thumb opposition, multi-side contact, in-hand rotation, cap twist, tactile dial/latch manipulation, tripod grasp.
Structured modules, validator, manifest, reports, JSON/CSV datasets, quality gate, unit tests.
118.6s generated video, HUD/keyframes, narration, judge brief, final report.
Blind tactile active perception plus no-ground-truth tactile pose estimation, assembly, and tactile combination lock.

honest_scope: Local readiness estimate derived from public rubric categories and generated evidence, not an official leaderboard score.
